body_txt: A variant of the Hard-Work Montage in which a character builds themselves up over time in preparation for a battle or athletic competition. Usually accompanied by uplifting music. If it's supposed to be taken seriously, they'll use something original, or just appropriate. If they're going for a full-on parody, it'll be one of the most well-recognised montage songs, or something reminiscent. If " Gonna Fly Now " from Rocky can't be used, then Joe Esposito's "You're the Best" or Survivor 's immortal "Eye Of The Tiger" makes for a good substitute. Closely related to the Lock-and-Load Montage , and often overlaps with the Failure Montage and Testing Range Mishap . See also Workout Fanservice .
